heading: Omitted
label: 1300h–4 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which related to organization of the tribe, adoption of a tribal constitution, and election of a tribal governing body, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 100–420, § 6102 Stat. 1578Sept. 8, 1988
